title: Getting Started with Krkn - Chaos Engineering for Kubernetes
description: Learn chaos engineering hands-on with Krkn, the CNCF chaos tool for Kubernetes. Kill pods, hog node resources, and orchestrate multi-scenario chaos runs - then watch your cluster heal itself.

steps.title: Meet Your Cluster and Deploy a Target App
Your First Chaos Experiment: Kill Pods
Read the Results: Recovery and Exit Codes
Node Chaos: CPU Hog on a Worker
See the Impact: Krkn's Web UI
